title: Expose gpu-matmul/gpu-elementwise/gpu-softmax/gpu-reduce/gpu-transpose as real builtins (LLVM + VM)
goal: gpu-matmul/gpu-elementwise/gpu-softmax/gpu-reduce/gpu-transpose are documented in ESHKOL_QUICK_REFERENCE.md but are 'Unknown function' in both the LLVM-compiled and VM paths. Wire them as real builtins in both paths, dispatching to the existing vm_gpu_dispatch ops / Metal+CUDA kernels.
acceptance: (gpu-matmul A B) works in -r AND compiled (no 'Unknown function')
each of the 5 gpu-* builtins resolves in both paths
